questions.topic: Media Literacy and Digital Citizenship: Computing Systems
standardRefs: NYS Computer Science and Digital Fluency Computing Systems
New York State P-12 Learning Standards
questions.prompt: In Media Literacy and Digital Citizenship, which concept is most central to the unit "Media Literacy and Digital Citizenship: Computing Systems"?
questions.correctText: hardware
choices: hardware
IP address
software
troubleshooting
questions.explanation: hardware is a core idea in Media Literacy and Digital Citizenship: Computing Systems. The related standard asks students to connect the concept to evidence, process, or application rather than treat it as a loose vocabulary word.

questions.topic: Media Literacy and Digital Citizenship: Computing Systems

questions.correctText: Use evidence to explain software.

Use evidence to explain software.
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to software; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.
